challenge.title: Korak 18
challenge.description:
Sledeći korak je da prođete kroz spajanu listu kako biste pronašli čvor koji sadrži element za uklanjanje.

Kreirajte petlju while koja proverava kada current_node nije None i kada current_node.element nije jednako element. Unutar petlje while, dodelite current_node na previous_node.

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should have a while loop inside the remove method.
Your while loop should check for when current_node is not None and when current_node.element is not equal to element.
tests.testString:
({
  test: () => runPython(`
  _cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("remove").find_whiles()[0].find_conditions()[0]
  assert _cond.is_equivalent("current_node is not None and current_node.element != element")
`)})

tests.text: You should assign current_node to previous_node inside the while loop.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
_cond = _Node(_code).find_class("LinkedList").find_function("remove").find_whiles()[0]
assert _cond.is_equivalent("while current_node is not None and current_node.element != element:\\n previous_node = current_node")
`) })

challengeFiles.name: main
